---
title: Festival des Lumières
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549184/fetedeslumieres_i0cxnk.jpg
description: Festival des Lumières, Lyon
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/12/09
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549184/fetedeslumieres_i0cxnk.jpg)

:::
